session.user: Run `make prettier-check` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the results. Just run the command and report output - do not modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier check command from the repository root.
session.tool_result: prettier --check '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
**Result: prettier passed**
All markdown files conform to Prettier code style. No formatting issues were found.
